steps.name: Alembic migration: create travel_diary_entries table with indexes
TravelDiaryEntryModel ORM with lead/user FKs and cascade delete
DiaryService with HEIC support and auto-thumbnail generation (300x300 JPEG)
DiaryService ownership validation (user can only access own entries)
DiaryService atomic cleanup: DB-first delete, S3 cleanup after commit
FastAPI routes: POST /leads/{id}/diary/entries, GET /leads/{id}/diary/entries, GET /users/me/diary, DELETE /leads/{id}/diary/entries/{entry_id}
Hydrate presigned URLs in all read responses (POST, GET list, GET timeline)
Integration tests with mocked S3 (full cycle, privacy violation, HEIC upload)
